name: Multi-Site Clinical Study Gantt Chart
input: Create a Gantt chart for a 24-month multi-site clinical study. Phase 1 - Preparation (Months 1-4): IRB approval (M1-M2), Site selection and training (M2-M3), Database setup (M3-M4). Phase 2 - Enrollment (Months 4-12): Site 1 enrollment (M4-M8), Site 2 enrollment (M5-M10), Site 3 enrollment (M6-M12). Phase 3 - Treatment & Follow-up (Months 8-20): Treatment period (M8-M16), 3-month follow-up (M16-M20). Phase 4 - Analysis & Reporting (Months 18-24): Data lock (M18), Statistical analysis (M18-M21), Manuscript preparation (M21-M23), Submission (M24). Key milestones: DSMB reviews at M8, M12, M16.
qualityCriteria: Correct date ranges for each task
Overlapping tasks shown (parallel enrollment across sites)
Section grouping visible (Preparation, Enrollment, Treatment, Analysis)
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Professional Gantt with color-coded phases, milestone diamonds, overlapping bars for parallel enrollment, clean time axis with month labels.
